text:
The is an Eldian family that lives within the Walls. It is the family that Special Operations Squad member Jean Kirstein hails from.

History

In year 847, Jean joined the 104th Training Corps with the initial goal to join the Military Police Brigade.

Story

Wall Sealing arc

Jean, having graduated as the sixth best soldier, eventually choose to join the Survey Corps.

Return to Shiganshina arc

As Eren and Jean are fighting, Eren mocks on Jean, calling him by the nickname his mother uses for her son and adding he should be nicer to her, to which Jean answers by hitting him and telling him to forget about that.

War for Paradis arc

In the aftermath of the Rumbling, Connie mentions how Historia Reiss took in his and Jean's family to protect them.
